novelDownload.disclaimer2: You are solely responsible for any content obtained, stored, used, or distributed via this feature. The software and developers do not guarantee legality or accuracy of content sources, and assume no liability for any losses arising from use or inability to use this feature.
novelDownload.disclaimer3: Do not use this feature to download or distribute copyrighted works without authorization, or any illegal content. Using this feature indicates you have read and agreed to the terms above.

aiCover.promptAuthorBase: The cover must clearly display the author pen name: {penName}, with readable typography.

outlineManager.title: Outline Manager
outlineManager.refineRequirementPlaceholder: Optional: describe what AI should improve (if empty, recommended direction is used)
outlineManager.splitRequirementPlaceholder: Optional: add finer split rules (if empty, recommended style rules are used)
outlineManager.splitParseFailed: AI output format cannot be parsed. Copy raw text, adjust requirements, and retry.

refineSuggestions.details: Add key details and settings: complete causality, environment, key props/rules, and improve paragraph coherence ({strength}).
refineSuggestions.conflict: Strengthen conflict turns: add resistance/reversal/misunderstanding or objective escalation to improve dramatic tension and rhythm ({strength}).
refineSuggestions.pacing: Optimize pacing hierarchy: adjust information density and paragraph beats, enhancing setup-to-payoff flow ({strength}).
refineSuggestions.world: Complete character/world clues: enrich motives, stances, and world-rule links, ensuring settings remain usable and consistent ({strength}).
refineSuggestions.overall: Expand and polish overall: enrich depth, expression quality, and narrative layers without changing core intent ({strength}).

splitSuggestions.plot: Split by plot stages: keep clear stage boundaries (setup-development-climax-ending), and ensure each segment contains core conflicts and progress.
splitSuggestions.conflict: Split by conflict escalation: each segment should map to a new escalation node (obstacle-turn-escalation-resolution/foreshadow), with continuous causality.
splitSuggestions.timeline: Split by timeline: each segment covers a continuous time window, emphasizing continuity and avoiding jumps.
splitSuggestions.chapter: Split by chapter/section: each segment should read like a mini chapter with a clear theme and closure for later writing.
